scope: bench-test hardware rating selection; owner must confirm brands/suppliers before purchase

pump.type: 12 V DC diaphragm sprayer pump with pressure switch
pump.duty: intermittent bench and low-speed row prototype

nozzles.type: 110-degree flat-fan agricultural spray tip, TeeJet XR/TP11002-class

pressure_sensor.output: 0.5-4.5 V analog or isolated switch equivalent

liquid_level_sensor.type: tank float switch or non-contact level sensor
liquid_level_sensor.logic: low liquid opens interlock; no auto-resume

drivers.type: opto-isolated MOSFET/relay board with flyback protection

power.logic_isolation: separate Pixhawk/Pi BEC or buck supply

bench_acceptance: At 40 PSI, either left or right nozzle sprays while the opposite valve is closed.
With both zones enabled, total target flow is about 1.51 L/min and pump has at least 3x nominal flow margin.
Low-liquid or pressure fault cuts pump and both valves off without Raspberry Pi software.
Pump and solenoid loads are fused and flyback-protected before Pixhawk connection.

sources.claim: TeeJet 11002-class flat fan nozzle is 110 degrees, about 0.20 GPM at 40 PSI, pressure range about 15-60 PSI.
Common 12 V diaphragm sprayer pumps are available around 5-6 L/min and 60-80 PSI.
